name: Temple of Lily
short_description: In the ancient Temple of Lily a powerful Necromancer has risen from the shadows, seeking to destroy the sacred land. Defend the temple from the evil forces of the Necromancer. Build towers infused with the pure energy of Lily to fend off the relentless waves of undead creatures.
detailed_description:
In the ancient Temple of Lily a powerful Necromancer has risen from the shadows, seeking to destroy the sacred land.
Using dark magic to twist the once peaceful halls into a realm of death and decay.
The Necromancer has raised army of twisted creatures and corrupted spirits to do his bidding and spread chaos throughout the land.
Take on the task of protecting the temple from the malevolent forces of the Necromancer.
Strategically build towers infused with the pure energy of Lily to fend off the relentless waves of undead creatures.
Upgrade your towers and unlock special abilities to unleash the full power of Lily against the Necromancer's minions.
With each victory, the Temple of Lily grows closer to salvation, and the darkness begins to recede.
Only by harnessing the power of the goddess Lily can you vanquish the Necromancer and restore peace to the sacred temple.

Features
Build Rune Towers and uncover magical Runes to upgrade your towers with powerful effects to burn, freeze, slow, and obliterate your enemies!
From thundering storms and deadly poisons, to flaming infernos and icy blizzards, combine any upgrade without limits!
Unleash powerful Ancient Magic to aid your towers and destroy The Necromancer's minions.
Uncover Ancient Knowledge lost to time to unlock powerful abilities and provide permanent bonus effects.
Challenge multiple games modes over a large variety of maps, each with their own unique layout
Discover long forgotten Relics infused with the light of Lily, take on the Necromancer, and free the Temple of Lily from its curse!
